title: mesosphaerum sidifolium
intro: Mesosphaerum sidifolium, also known as West Indian lemon balm or Mexican tea, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and relieving symptoms of respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Mesosphaerum sidifolium include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
